responsibilities: Build and maintain detailed financial models to forecast company earnings, revenue growth, and cash flow generation
Publish equity research reports with investment ratings, price targets, and detailed valuation analysis on covered companies
Conduct industry and competitive analysis to identify market trends affecting covered sectors and individual stocks
Host and participate in earnings calls, management meetings, and investor conferences to gather company-specific insights
Develop investment theses backed by fundamental analysis, valuation multiples, and discounted cash flow methodology
Monitor quarterly earnings releases and update financial models and price targets based on reported company performance
Present stock recommendations and sector outlooks to institutional clients, portfolio managers, and internal sales teams
Track regulatory, macroeconomic, and competitive developments that could materially impact covered companies' valuations
